title: Loops without 'break' should not have 'else' clauses
description: Avoid using 'else' clauses in loops without 'break' statements, as it can lead to unintended execution.
message: Loop without 'break' should not have 'else' clause.
why_is_this_an_issue: Using 'else' clauses in loops without 'break' can lead to unintended execution and make the code less readable and harder to maintain.
how_to_fix: Use 'break' or restructure the loop to avoid using 'else' clauses.

metadata.title: Loops without 'break' should not have 'else' clauses
